# Chapter 12: Cryptography and security  (~110 pp)
- 12.1 Threat models (12) · 12.2 Symmetric cryptography (15) · 12.3 Public-key cryptography (15) · 12.4 Hash functions, MACs, digital signatures (15) · 12.5 Authentication, key exchange, TLS internals (15) · 12.6 Application security: injection, auth, supply chain (15) · 12.7 Side channels and physical attacks (12) · 12.8 Failure section: Heartbleed, Equifax, SolarWinds, Log4Shell (11)

**Archetype**: interface, failure, ethics. **Project**: implement a simple authenticated-encryption protocol; analyse threat model. **Exercises**: 30.
